This directory contains a Coq'ified version of parts of GHC.

**Do not edit files here!** This directory is generated by `make` from
`examples/ghc/`. Hand-written modules are symlinked from `manual/`;
generated `.v` files come from hs-to-coq translation of GHC 9.10.3 source.

`make clean` in the parent directory removes this entire directory.
To regenerate: `make -C examples/ghc`.
